scenarios.name: raw_R
scenarios.description: No costs applied — the raw measured R
scenarios.note: Below 0.10R promotion threshold. Below 0.05R SCALP threshold borderline.

scenarios.name: estimated_base_cost
scenarios.description: Taker 4bps entry + 4bps exit + 1bp entry slippage + 1bp exit slippage
scenarios.note: Cost exceeds raw R. Alpha is expectancy-negative after costs.

scenarios.name: 2x_cost_stress
scenarios.description: 2x the base cost to stress-test robustness

scenarios.name: 5x_cost_stress
scenarios.description: 5x the base cost — extreme market conditions

scenarios.name: maker_like
scenarios.note: Only scenario with positive adjusted R, but well below 0.10R threshold.

split_rescue_analysis.reason: No per-trade data available. Split analysis requires individual trade records with symbol, direction, timestamp, ATR, spread, volume, and exit fields.
split_rescue_analysis.what_is_needed: CSV/Parquet with per-trade records from run-alpha-truth-v6-20260707

verdict.label: WATCH
rationale: Raw +0.0515R is genuinely above zero — not obviously noise
Cost-adjusted at best case (maker): +0.0205R — too thin for promotion
Win rate near 50% with profit_factor 1.11 is consistent with weak edge OR 170-way selection bias
Per-trade analysis could reveal a cost-surviving subset, but data does not exist
Sharpe 0.79 is positive but low — would need >2.0 for live confidence
Max drawdown -20.96R is severe for 870 trades
verdict.decision: WATCH — rescuing requires trade-level data and subset analysis. Without it, alpha is cost-negative.
next_actions: Re-run Truth V6 pipeline with trade-level output
Check high-ATR-period trades for lower cost/R
